name: Diesel-Water Fuel Emulsion Reduced Rate

eligibility.description: The emulsion additive must be registered with the EPA and the person removing/selling the fuel must be registered under section 4101.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a reduced tax rate of 19.7 cents (instead of 24.3 cents) for diesel-water fuel emulsions that are at least 14 percent water.
